projects.title: Homemade Observatory
projects.description: End-to-end platform integrating Raspberry Pi, Arduino, and Python for automated telescope control and image capture. The web layer provides real-time data streaming, user authentication, and a celestial events calendar - hardware and full-stack software designed and built from scratch.

projects.title: Arduino Weather Station
projects.description: Arduino-powered sensor system with a REST API serving real-time and historical weather data. Integrated into the observatory pipeline to gate imaging sessions on atmospheric conditions - embedded firmware, backend API, and frontend dashboard built in-house.

projects.title: Asteroid Monitoring
projects.description: Real-time data platform consuming the NASA NeoWS API to track near-Earth asteroids. Surfaces close-approach timing, velocity, size estimates, and orbit trajectories - transforming raw orbital mechanics data into an accessible, production-deployed web application.

projects.title: Interesting places and attractions
projects.description: Production geo-discovery portal built on microservice architecture with Next.js, PHP, and MySQL. Features map integration, user-generated content, photo uploads, and a gamified reputation system - designed, architected, and shipped end-to-end.

projects.title: Astronomical Project
projects.description: Astronomy outreach channel delivering science-accurate content, celestial event coverage, and astrophotography to a growing audience. Built and operated end-to-end - content pipeline, production workflow, and community management.

experience.duties: Developed scalable, modular components for the client application using modern architectural patterns. Designed solutions for key functions such as client-server interactions, REST API integration, and service integrations. Implemented automatic UI tests (unit and integration) to enhance solution quality. Optimized application architecture, including authentication, logging, and data processing. Created and maintained a test environment with tools for screenshot testing and API simulation to streamline development. Contributed to code quality by implementing analysis tools, CI/CD processes, and conducting regular QA sessions. Collaborated with the UI/UX team to enhance UI components and improve application usability.

Led the full development cycle of WordPress sites for media organizations, creating scalable solutions for high-traffic demands. Designed custom PHP modules, optimized MySQL databases, and implemented performance enhancements to ensure reliability. Managed VPS setup, security measures, and ongoing maintenance to safeguard hosting environments. Provided technical support, developed SEO strategies, and integrated social media modules for streamlined content distribution. Additionally, I designed user-friendly WordPress themes, enhancing both functionality and user experience.

Led the development of a quality assurance portal for microservices, streamlining code and component reviews. Developed a Bitbucket integration API to automate project data extraction and implemented test automation using React Testing Library and Jest for UI testing. Created automated UI tests for over 36 microservices and designed Playwright integration tests. Enhanced CI/CD pipelines with added test and code quality checks. Built a microservice to send test statistics to the quality portal and developed a plugin for test report aggregation with Allure. Contributed to Agile task management, wrote technical documentation, and implemented accessibility testing, while continuously improving the portal's features and functionality. Regularly conducted code reviews to ensure high-quality standards.

Developed and integrated a payment system with state-owned banks for federal programs, including cashback initiatives. Led the creation of a COVID-19 control system for the Orenburg region, integrating with government services and implementing an SMS notification API. Managed a development team using Agile and Scrum, overseeing projects like a citizen-government portal for reporting urban issues and an API for e-document integration. Designed and maintained services for receiving charges and regulatory compliance in the Orenburg region, and implemented microservice architecture for government projects. Led fullstack development of portals for publishing legal acts and tax filings, ensuring smooth operations, compliance, and scalability.

Led the development of a comprehensive news aggregation system, including a UI for viewing news from multiple sources and an API for banner ad integration. Designed distributed databases for high-load systems and implemented CI/CD pipelines and backup systems. Developed APIs for Facebook user behavior emulation and telecom payment systems. Created a telecom billing system, integrated accounting modules, and developed tools for managing subscriber and payment statistics. Additionally, designed and developed corporate web portals, and provided technical documentation for system administrators and architects.

Led the design and development of the PostgreSQL database for a geographic information system (GIS), optimizing spatial data handling. Developed core GIS components using PHP and Yii, and the mapping subsystem with Delphi, including its UI with JavaScript and jQuery. Built data registry modules and automated scripts to streamline operations. Transitioned the system to a microservices architecture for improved scalability, managed deployment on client servers, and created role-based access models. Provided comprehensive developer and user documentation, and handled server administration for ongoing development and deployment support.

Designed and developed the architecture for a custom content management system (CMS) using PHP and Laravel, creating an intuitive administrator interface. Implemented a scalable PostgreSQL database structure and developed various custom modules, including news, articles, and user management. Prototyped MVPs based on client specifications and built APIs for integration with hotel and air ticket booking services. Delivered custom websites on the CMS platform and provided ongoing technical support, including user documentation.

Installed and configured Local Area Networks (LAN) for residential and commercial clients, ensuring reliable performance. Managed subscriber servers for optimal uptime and security, and installed security systems like alarms and video surveillance for comprehensive protection. Conducted fiber optic splicing and testing for stable connectivity, configured network switches for performance, and administered Linux servers. Provided technical support to clients, resolving network issues and system failures.

Assembled and configured desktop computers, ensuring optimal performance. Performed maintenance and repairs on office equipment, including printers and copiers, to minimize downtime. Refilled printer cartridges to maintain supply and installed Local Area Networks (LAN), including cable installation. Organized network cabinets and configured network switches for efficient traffic management. Diagnosed and repaired hardware and software issues, and developed custom billing software in Delphi to automate invoicing and payment processing.

index.title: Misha - Software Architect & Tech Lead
index.description: Software architect and tech lead with 19+ years designing production systems, leading engineering teams, and delivering full-stack applications across frontend, backend, and infrastructure.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: 19+ years building and shipping production systems for government agencies, media companies, and tech startups. Skills span full-stack development, system architecture, DevOps, and database design - applied across professional engagements and open-source projects.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: 19+ years of engineering leadership across government, media, and tech. Delivered full-stack systems from greenfield to production, led cross-functional teams, and defined technical direction across frontend, backend, and infrastructure.

projects.title: Personal Projects
projects.description: Side projects built end-to-end - from embedded hardware integration to full-stack web platforms. Each is deployed in production and reflects real system design decisions, not toy examples.
